cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Richard could have gone to the bakery. Let me start by listing out the information given. First, Richard woke up at 8am. That's the earliest time mentioned. Then there are several sightings by different people: - Betty saw him at the library reading from 9am to 2pm. - David saw him at the electronics store fixing a computer from 2pm to 4pm. - Mary saw him taking photos near the Eiffel Tower from 4pm to 5pm. - Hannah saw him on a rooftop from 5pm to 6pm. - Susan saw him driving to the water park from 6pm to 7pm. The bakery was closed after 7pm, so Richard had to go before that. The question is, when could he have gone? Let me break down his day as per the sightings: - 8am: Wakes up. - 9am-2pm: At the library with Betty. - 2pm-4pm: At the electronics store with David. - 4pm-5pm: Near Eiffel Tower with Mary. - 5pm-6pm: Rooftop with Hannah. - 6pm-7pm: Driving to water park with Susan.
